title: Connectors
subtitle: Manage API connectors, MCP servers, and their actions
emptyState: No connectors yet. Create your first one to connect external APIs.
deleteConnectorDescription: This connector and all its actions will be permanently deleted. This action cannot be undone.
descriptionPlaceholder: A brief description of this connector...
tokenPrefixHelp: Prefix before the token in Authorization header. Default: Bearer.
defaultTokenHelp: Used for testing. Per-user credentials will override this in a future version.
headerNameHelp: The HTTP header used to send the API key. Default: X-API-Key.
defaultApiKeyHelp: Used for testing. Per-user credentials will override this in a future version.
basicAuthHelp: Used for testing. Per-user credentials will override this in a future version.
selectOrCreateAction: Select an action or create a new one
deleteActionDescription: This action will be permanently deleted. This cannot be undone.
responseExtractHelp: JMESPath expression to extract relevant data from the API response.
advancedBuilderDesc: Best for bulk API doc imports, complex endpoint configuration, and multi-step API debugging.
saveConnectorFirst: Save the connector first to use AI assistant
aiEmptyNewMode: Describe the connector you want to create, or paste an OpenAPI spec URL.
aiEmptyExistingMode: Describe the API actions you want to create, and AI will generate them for you.
aiEmptyDbMode: Describe which tables to expose, or ask me to annotate your schema with display names.
aiSubtitleNewMode: AI will configure settings and actions
aiSubtitleExistingMode: AI will create, update, or delete actions
aiSubtitleDbMode: I can help annotate cryptic table names and suggest which tables to expose to your agents.
aiConnectorCreatedSuccess: Connector created. Settings and actions have been populated.
aiSaveSettingsFirst: Please save your connector settings first.
aiCreatedActions: Created {count, plural, one {# action} other {# actions}}: {names}
aiUpdatedActions: Updated {count, plural, one {# action} other {# actions}}: {names}
aiDeletedActions: Deleted {count, plural, one {# action} other {# actions}}
aiConnectorModified: Connector modified. Check the updated settings and actions.
aiErrorFallback: Something went wrong. Please try again.
readOnlyWarning: Write mode enabled. Agent can modify data.
discoverSchemaHint: Click "Discover Schema" to introspect your database
selectTable: Select a table to view columns
schemaImportComingSoon: Coming soon — Excel/CSV import and AI extraction.
